description: The omnipotent creator of the DC Multiverse.
name: The Presence

name: Lucifer Morningstar

description: Holds Dunamis Demiurgos. Power to create out of nothing.
name: Michael Demiurgos

description: Prime One Million. Absolute physical and solar energy peak.
name: Superman

description: Absolute quantum manipulation and multiversal awareness.
name: Doctor Manhattan

description: Multiversal threat. Consumes universes via antimatter.
name: Anti-Monitor

description: The Wrath of God. Nigh-omnipotent divine magic and judgment.

description: True Form. Multiversal conceptual threat and Omega Effect.
name: Darkseid

description: God of Truth form. Absolute physical combat and divine magic.
name: Wonder Woman

description: Mobius Chair. Faster than instantaneous teleportation.

description: Hellbat Armor. Forged by gods, grants peak physicals.
